description: Create a new Vicidial campaign with ID 'HIPAA_SEC' and name 'HIPAA Secure Outreach' configured with strict privacy and security settings to comply with data protection standards. The campaign must be active (Y) with Campaign CallerID 8005550199. Enforce the following security rules: Agent Display Lead Number set to X_LAST_4, Disable Alter Customer Phone set to Y, Disable Alter Customer Data set to Y, Manual Dial Override set to NONE, Agent Lead Search set to DISABLED, and View Calls in Queue set to NONE.
